title: General Manager of MD office
description:
About the Role:

We are seeking a highly experienced and strategic General Manager of MD Office to be part of the Management Team. This role is critical in providing leadership, technical advisory, strategic project oversight, and corporate support to ensure smooth and effective business operations.

You will lead a multi-functional team supporting senior management, drive company-wide strategic initiatives, and act as a key liaison between headquarters and local stakeholders.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Coordinate assignment of duties and tasks
  • Plan, implement, manage, and review the activities, procedures and processes in accordance with the strategic project charter.  
  • To provide technical advice and support other internal or external projects/requests
  • Translate and interpret HQ requests for implementation and execution.
  • Provide guidance and coach the team to achieve targeted performance.
  • Conduct regular check-ins with the team and provide feedback on performance.
  • Conduct engagement activities and discuss the developmental needs of the team.
  • Involve in discussions & meetings on cross-section and dept collaboration.
  • Mediate and arbitrate when differences and conflict arise between sections and depts
  • Participate in management meetings and discussions on policy formulation.
  • Lead, manage and role model change initiatives in the Company
  • Coordinate assignment of duties and tasks

Requirements:

  • Minimum Bachelor’s Degree in Chemical Engineering or equivalent
  • At least 10 years of relevant working experience, including 5 year in a similar leadership role managing corporate functions
  • Has working experience in managing a chemical manufacturing plant operation
  • Strong mediation and negotiation skills to facilitate cross-section and department collaboration
  • Familiar with Japanese work culture to support working with Japanese co-workers and Japan HQ
  • Strong leadership and people management skills to lead and manage cross-sectional teams
  • Able to make swift decisions, especially during urgent and emergency times
  • Able to remain calm to manage and during a conflict
  • Able to work under extreme pressure and guide the team to meet deadlines
  • Problem-solving skills using industry-appropriate technical tools
  • Proficient with MS Office
  • Familiar with ISO Management Systems
  • Good data analysis skills to drive decision making
  • Excellent command of English and Japanese JLPT N1 as this role requires translating verbally and in writing for business meetings from Japanese to English and vice versa is required.

Others:

  • Location: Jurong Island (Company Transport provided)

  • Commence work: ASAP.

  • Applicants can work in Singapore without requiring a work pass.

  • Working Hours: Mon ~ Fri from 8:00 am - 4:45 pm

Why Join Us?

  • Join a reputable MNC with structured learning and growth opportunities.

  • Attractive compensation with performance bonuses, AWS, allowances and comprehensive employee benefits.

  • Supportive and collaborative team culture.

  • Company-provided transport to Jurong Island

postedCompany.description:
UNIMATEC is a leading manufacturer of high-performance synthetic rubbers, supported by a global team of experienced chemists. We are committed to provide innovative solutions to meet technological challenges, shaping a world of endless possibilities with its unique technology.

UNIMATEC values leadership and problem-solving that deliver real results, offering diverse career paths and opportunities for professional growth within its global organization. Core values, as reflected in its policies, include a commitment to:

  • Quality: Continuously improving the quality management system to achieve customer satisfaction and meet specifications while adhering to legal and other requirements.
  • Environment & Energy: Continuously improving environmental and energy performance, protecting the environment through pollution prevention, ensuring resource availability, and complying with relevant legal requirements to maintain an environment-friendly and energy-efficient workplace.
  • Safety & Health: Continuously improving and protecting workplace safety and health, preventing injury and ill-health, eliminating hazards, minimizing risks, and ensuring the well-being of all personnel while complying with applicable legal requirements for a safe workplace.
postedCompany.name: UNIMATEC SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
